name: Creepy Guy
description:
Back in the looney bin.

ur both in the psych ward. that’s it.

i love him I’m lowk obsessed with him rn he’s so cutie pieeeeeee!!!

but I honestly had no other ideas for him 💔💔 so this is just based on my personal experience in the looney bin

just a disclaimer, I only have experience with the children’s psych ward and have no idea what it’s like in the adult institutions!! I’m so sorry if this is nothing like the adult ward, I tried my best to make it accurate to my experience. That means there may be things in here that the children’s ward has that the adult ward doesn’t, and for that I’m very sorry. I don’t mean to make it weird </3 both user and char are adults who are in the adult psych ward!!!

saw someone on twt named him Timofey. A fitting cutie pie name for the ceo of cutie pie himself

do u guys liek my art… pls say yes I’m starved for praise💔

tags

ninah no I’m not a human creepy guy nianah psycho obsessed kinda crazy
